testcase.name: kiemThuDangNhap[standard_user, secret_sauce, THANH_CONG, Dang nhap voi standard_user](1)
testcase.system-out: === Test: Dang nhap voi standard_user === Username: [standard_user] | Password: [secret_sauce] | Kết quả mong đợi: THANH_CONG => KẾT QUẢ: Đăng nhập thành công ✓
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. thg 3 03, 2026 3:37:07 CH org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 145 thg 3 03, 2026 3:37:07 CH org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 145.0.7632.117. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.15.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
